name: Wheeler Real Estate Investment Trust Inc. 7.00% Senior Subordinated Convertible Notes Due 2031
summary: Wheeler Real Estate Investment Trust Inc. 7.00% Senior Subordinated Convertible Notes Due 2031 represents debt securities issued by Wheeler Real Estate Investment Trust, a company focused on owning, acquiring, financing, developing, leasing, and managing income-producing retail properties. These notes offer a fixed interest rate and the option to convert them into shares of the company's common stock before their maturity date. The headquarters of Wheeler Real Estate Investment Trust is likely located in the United States.
